title: Comic Studies
description: Three independent eight-panel comic pages testing layout, character consistency, and commercial storytelling.
creative_direction: Independent comic studies under the same theme: each is a complete eight-panel page with its own scene, protagonist, and product-story structure.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.
